result:
Build succeeded (redis-server binary produced fresh, no errors). Summary of changes:

- Added `robj *lookupKeyReadOrReplyEx(robj *key, client *c, robj *reply)` in `src/db.c` (declared in `src/server.h`), with identical behavior but key-first argument order.
- Migrated all 36 call sites across `t_array.c`, `geo.c`, `t_set.c`, `t_stream.c`, `t_list.c`, `bitops.c`, `t_zset.c`, `t_string.c`, `t_hash.c` to the new function with swapped argument order.
- Removed the old `lookupKeyReadOrReply` declaration and definition; no references to the old name remain anywhere in the repo.
- `make` completed a full rebuild with no errors.
